API docs by Redocly

Blerp Identity Service API (1.0.0-draft)

Download OpenAPI specification:

Blerp Support: adi11235@gmail.com URL: https://github.com/e6qu/blerp

REST + JSON interface for Blerp Identity Service

Clean-room OpenAPI contract describing the public REST API for user, session, organization, and webhook management. This specification is the authoritative contract for backend/frontend work and must exist locally before any detailed implementation plan is executed.

Auth

Authentication and token lifecycle

Create pending signup

Creates a signup intent and dispatches verification challenges for a new end user.

Authorizations:
SecretKey
Request Body schema: application/json
required
email
string <email>
phone
string
password
string
strategy
required
string
Enum: "password" "magic_link" "otp" "passkey" "oauth"

Responses

Production

https://api.blerp.dev/v1/auth/signups

Staging

https://staging-api.blerp.dev/v1/auth/signups

Local development (docker-compose)

http://localhost:4000/v1/auth/signups

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "email": "user@example.com",
  • "phone": "string",
  • "password": "string",
  • "strategy": "password"
}

Response samples

  • 201
  • 400
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "string",
  • "identifier": "string",
  • "strategy": "password",
  • "status": "needs_identifier",
  • "verification": {
    • "channel": "email_code",
    • "code": "string",
    • "expires_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
    },
  • "created_session_id": "string",
  • "expires_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
}

Complete verification for signup

Finalizes a pending signup by validating submitted verification factors.

Authorizations:
SecretKey
path Parameters
signup_id
required
string
Request Body schema: application/json
required
code
string
token
string
object

Responses

Production

https://api.blerp.dev/v1/auth/signups/{signup_id}/attempt

Staging

https://staging-api.blerp.dev/v1/auth/signups/{signup_id}/attempt

Local development (docker-compose)

http://localhost:4000/v1/auth/signups/{signup_id}/attempt

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "code": "string",
  • "token": "string",
  • "webauthn_response": { }
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
Content type
application/json
{
  • "user": {
    • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08",
    • "external_id": "string",
    • "username": "string",
    • "primary_email_id": "13ee79c2-7a27-4c51-9c23-b88432900ecb",
    • "email_addresses": [
      • {
        • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08",
        • "email": "user@example.com",
        • "verification": {
          • "status": "unverified",
          • "strategy": "email_code",
          • "attempts": 0,
          • "last_attempted_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
          }
        }
      ],
    • "phone_numbers": [
      • {
        • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08",
        • "number": "string",
        • "verification": {
          • "status": "unverified",
          • "strategy": "email_code",
          • "attempts": 0,
          • "last_attempted_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
          }
        }
      ],
    • "passkeys": [
      • {
        • "id": "string",
        • "friendly_name": "string",
        • "transports": [
          • "string"
          ]
        }
      ],
    • "public_metadata": { },
    • "private_metadata": { },
    • "unsafe_metadata": { },
    • "status": "active",
    • "last_sign_in_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
    • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
    • "updated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
    • "deleted_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
    },
  • "session": {
    • "id": "string",
    • "user_id": "a169451c-8525-4352-b8ca-070dd449a1a5",
    • "organization_id": "7c60d51f-b44e-4682-87d6-449835ea4de6",
    • "status": "active",
    • "active_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
    • "expires_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
    • "abandoned_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
    • "ip_address": "string",
    • "user_agent": "string",
    • "latest_activity": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
    • "actor": {
      • "type": "user",
      • "id": "string"
      },
    • "first_factor": "string",
    • "second_factor": "string",
    • "last_rotated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
    • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
    }
}

Begin sign-in flow

Starts a sign-in attempt using the configured primary factor (password, OTP, or WebAuthn).

Authorizations:
SecretKeyPublishableKey
Request Body schema: application/json
required
identifier
required
string
strategy
required
string
Enum: "password" "magic_link" "otp" "passkey" "oauth"

Responses

Production

https://api.blerp.dev/v1/auth/signins

Staging

https://staging-api.blerp.dev/v1/auth/signins

Local development (docker-compose)

http://localhost:4000/v1/auth/signins

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "identifier": "string",
  • "strategy": "password"
}

Response samples

  • 201
  • 400
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "string",
  • "identifier": "string",
  • "status": "needs_first_factor",
  • "strategy": "string",
  • "mfa_required": true,
  • "available_strategies": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "created_session_id": "string"
}

Complete sign-in attempt

Validates a pending sign-in challenge and issues new session tokens on success.

Authorizations:
SecretKeyPublishableKey
path Parameters
signin_id
required
string
Request Body schema: application/json
required
password
string
code
string
object

Responses

Production

https://api.blerp.dev/v1/auth/signins/{signin_id}/attempt

Staging

https://staging-api.blerp.dev/v1/auth/signins/{signin_id}/attempt

Local development (docker-compose)

http://localhost:4000/v1/auth/signins/{signin_id}/attempt

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "password": "string",
  • "code": "string",
  • "webauthn_response": { }
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
Content type
application/json
{
  • "session": {
    • "id": "string",
    • "user_id": "a169451c-8525-4352-b8ca-070dd449a1a5",
    • "organization_id": "7c60d51f-b44e-4682-87d6-449835ea4de6",
    • "status": "active",
    • "active_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
    • "expires_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
    • "abandoned_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
    • "ip_address": "string",
    • "user_agent": "string",
    • "latest_activity": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
    • "actor": {
      • "type": "user",
      • "id": "string"
      },
    • "first_factor": "string",
    • "second_factor": "string",
    • "last_rotated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
    • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
    },
  • "tokens": {
    • "access_token": "string",
    • "refresh_token": "string",
    • "expires_in": 0,
    • "session_id": "string",
    • "issued_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
    }
}

Revoke a session

Immediately revokes a session so the associated devices must reauthenticate.

Authorizations:
SecretKey
path Parameters
session_id
required
string
Request Body schema: application/json
required
reason
string

Responses

Production

https://api.blerp.dev/v1/sessions/{session_id}/revoke

Staging

https://staging-api.blerp.dev/v1/sessions/{session_id}/revoke

Local development (docker-compose)

http://localhost:4000/v1/sessions/{session_id}/revoke

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "reason": "string"
}

Response samples

  • 400
Content type
application/json
{
  • "error": {
    • "code": "string",
    • "message": "string",
    • "doc_url": "http://example.com",
    • "request_id": "string"
    }
}

Exchange refresh token for access token

Trades a refresh token for a new pair of access/refresh tokens using the rotation policy.

Authorizations:
SecretKey
Request Body schema: application/json
required
refresh_token
required
string

Responses

Production

https://api.blerp.dev/v1/tokens/refresh

Staging

https://staging-api.blerp.dev/v1/tokens/refresh

Local development (docker-compose)

http://localhost:4000/v1/tokens/refresh

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "refresh_token": "string"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
Content type
application/json
{
  • "access_token": "string",
  • "refresh_token": "string",
  • "expires_in": 0,
  • "session_id": "string",
  • "issued_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
}

Users

List users

Returns a paginated, filterable list of users for the active project.

Authorizations:
SecretKey
query Parameters
email
string
created_before
string <date-time>
created_after
string <date-time>
status
string
Enum: "active" "inactive" "banned"
metadata_key
string

JSON pointer style path under public/private metadata.
metadata_value
string

Value to match for the provided metadata_key.
limit
integer
Default: 20
cursor
string

Responses

Production

https://api.blerp.dev/v1/users

Staging

https://staging-api.blerp.dev/v1/users

Local development (docker-compose)

http://localhost:4000/v1/users

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": [
    • {
      • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08",
      • "external_id": "string",
      • "username": "string",
      • "primary_email_id": "13ee79c2-7a27-4c51-9c23-b88432900ecb",
      • "email_addresses": [
        • {
          • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08",
          • "email": "user@example.com",
          • "verification": {
            • "status": "unverified",
            • "strategy": "email_code",
            • "attempts": 0,
            • "last_attempted_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
            }
          }
        ],
      • "phone_numbers": [
        • {
          • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08",
          • "number": "string",
          • "verification": {
            • "status": "unverified",
            • "strategy": "email_code",
            • "attempts": 0,
            • "last_attempted_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
            }
          }
        ],
      • "passkeys": [
        • {
          • "id": "string",
          • "friendly_name": "string",
          • "transports": [
            • "string"
            ]
          }
        ],
      • "public_metadata": { },
      • "private_metadata": { },
      • "unsafe_metadata": { },
      • "status": "active",
      • "last_sign_in_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "updated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "deleted_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
      }
    ],
  • "meta": {
    • "total": 0,
    • "next_cursor": "string",
    • "previous_cursor": "string"
    }
}

Create user

Creates a user with initial profile data and credential state.

Authorizations:
SecretKey
Request Body schema: application/json
required
email_addresses
Array of strings <email> [ items <email > ]
phone_numbers
Array of strings
password
string
object (PublicMetadata)
object (PrivateMetadata)

Responses

Production

https://api.blerp.dev/v1/users

Staging

https://staging-api.blerp.dev/v1/users

Local development (docker-compose)

http://localhost:4000/v1/users

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "email_addresses": [
    • "user@example.com"
    ],
  • "phone_numbers": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "password": "string",
  • "public_metadata": { },
  • "private_metadata": { }
}

}

Retrieve user

Fetches a single user record including profile metadata and identities.

Authorizations:
SecretKey
path Parameters
user_id
required
string

Responses

Production

https://api.blerp.dev/v1/users/{user_id}

Staging

https://staging-api.blerp.dev/v1/users/{user_id}

string

object (PublicMetadata)

Soft delete user

Soft deletes a user so they can be restored later but cannot authenticate.

Authorizations:
SecretKey
path Parameters
user_id
required
string

Responses

Production

https://api.blerp.dev/v1/users/{user_id}

Staging

https://staging-api.blerp.dev/v1/users/{user_id}

Local development (docker-compose)

http://localhost:4000/v1/users/{user_id}

Restore soft-deleted user

Restores a previously soft-deleted user and re-enables access.

Authorizations:
SecretKey
path Parameters
user_id
required
string

Responses

Production

https://api.blerp.dev/v1/users/{user_id}/restore

Staging

https://staging-api.blerp.dev/v1/users/{user_id}/restore

Local development (docker-compose)

http://localhost:4000/v1/users/{user_id}/restore

Link OAuth identity

Associates an external OAuth identity with the specified user for future logins.

Authorizations:
SecretKey
path Parameters
user_id
required
string
Request Body schema: application/json
required
provider
required
string
provider_user_id
required
string
access_token
string
refresh_token
string
expires_at
string <date-time>

Responses

Production

https://api.blerp.dev/v1/users/{user_id}/identities/oauth

Staging

https://staging-api.blerp.dev/v1/users/{user_id}/identities/oauth

Local development (docker-compose)

http://localhost:4000/v1/users/{user_id}/identities/oauth

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "provider": "string",
  • "provider_user_id": "string",
  • "access_token": "string",
  • "refresh_token": "string",
  • "expires_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
}

Organizations

List organizations

Returns a paginated list of organizations in the current project.

Authorizations:
SecretKey
query Parameters
project_id
string
cursor
string

Responses

Production

https://api.blerp.dev/v1/organizations

Staging

https://staging-api.blerp.dev/v1/organizations

Local development (docker-compose)

http://localhost:4000/v1/organizations

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": [
    • {
      • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08",
      • "project_id": "405d8375-3514-403b-8c43-83ae74cfe0e9",
      • "name": "string",
      • "slug": "string",
      • "metadata_public": { },
      • "metadata_private": { },
      • "domains": [
        • {
          • "domain": "string",
          • "status": "pending",
          • "verified_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
          }
        ],
      • "settings": {
        • "allow_invites": true,
        • "default_role": "string",
        • "mfa_policy": "optional"
        },
      • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
      }
    ],
  • "meta": {
    • "total": 0,

email

integer

}

Rotate API key secret

Rotates the secret for an existing API key without changing the identifier.

Authorizations:
SecretKey
path Parameters
project_id
required
string
key_id
required
string
Request Body schema: application/json
optional
reason
string

Responses

Production

https://api.blerp.dev/v1/projects/{project_id}/keys/{key_id}/rotate

Staging

https://staging-api.blerp.dev/v1/projects/{project_id}/keys/{key_id}/rotate

Local development (docker-compose)

http://localhost:4000/v1/projects/{project_id}/keys/{key_id}/rotate

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "reason": "string"
}

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "string",
  • "project_id": "string",
  • "environment": "development",
  • "type": "publishable",
  • "scopes": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "prefix": "string",
  • "label": "string",
  • "secret": "string",
  • "status": "active",
  • "last_used_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "rotated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
}

Config

Tenant-wide configuration endpoints

Retrieve theme configuration

Returns the hosted component theme configuration assigned to the project.

Authorizations:
SecretKey

Responses

Production

https://api.blerp.dev/v1/config/theme

Staging

https://staging-api.blerp.dev/v1/config/theme

Local development (docker-compose)

http://localhost:4000/v1/config/theme

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "mode": "light",
  • "primary_color": "string",
  • "accent_color": "string",
  • "logo_url": "http://example.com",
  • "favicon_url": "http://example.com",
  • "font_family": "string",
  • "button_shape": "rounded"
}

Update theme configuration

Updates the theme configuration that powers hosted components.

Authorizations:
SecretKey
Request Body schema: application/json
required
mode
string
Enum: "light" "dark" "system"
primary_color
string
accent_color
string
logo_url
string <uri>
favicon_url
string or null <uri>
font_family
string
button_shape
string
Enum: "rounded" "pill" "sharp"

Responses

Production

https://api.blerp.dev/v1/config/theme

Staging

https://staging-api.blerp.dev/v1/config/theme

Local development (docker-compose)

http://localhost:4000/v1/config/theme

application/json

  • "mode": "light",
  • "primary_color": "string",
  • "accent_color": "string",
  • "logo_url": "http://example.com",
  • "favicon_url": "http://example.com",
  • "font_family": "string",

}

Content type
application/json

Audit

Audit log queries

List audit log entries

Returns paginated audit log entries for compliance and monitoring.

Authorizations:
SecretKey
query Parameters
actor_id
string
resource_type
string
resource_id
string
created_before
string <date-time>
created_after
string <date-time>
cursor
string
limit
integer
Default: 50

Responses

Production

https://api.blerp.dev/v1/audit_logs

Staging

https://staging-api.blerp.dev/v1/audit_logs

Local development (docker-compose)

http://localhost:4000/v1/audit_logs

Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": [
    • {

        • "type": "user",
        • "id": "string",
        • "email": "user@example.com"
        },

        • "type": "string",
        • "id": "string",

        },

      }
    ],
  • "meta": {
    • "total": 0,
    • "next_cursor": "string",
    • "previous_cursor": "string"
    }
}

Create session during SSR

required
user_id

string
organization_id
string
expires_at
string <date-time>

Discovery

OpenID Connect discovery metadata

Retrieve OpenID Connect discovery metadata

Exposes the OpenID Connect discovery document so clients can locate Blerp endpoints automatically.

Authorizations:
SecretKey

Responses

Production

https://api.blerp.dev/.well-known/openid-configuration

Staging

https://staging-api.blerp.dev/.well-known/openid-configuration

Local development (docker-compose)

http://localhost:4000/.well-known/openid-configuration

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "issuer": "http://example.com",
  • "authorization_endpoint": "http://example.com",
  • "token_endpoint": "http://example.com",
  • "userinfo_endpoint": "http://example.com",
  • "jwks_uri": "http://example.com",
  • "response_types_supported": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "subject_types_supported": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "scopes_supported": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "id_token_signing_alg_values_supported": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "token_endpoint_auth_methods_supported": [
    • "string"
    ]
}

Retrieve JWKS (well-known)

Returns the JSON Web Key Set under the /.well-known path for standards-compliant OIDC verification.

Authorizations:
SecretKey

Responses

Production

https://api.blerp.dev/.well-known/jwks.json

Staging

https://staging-api.blerp.dev/.well-known/jwks.json

Local development (docker-compose)

http://localhost:4000/.well-known/jwks.json

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "keys": [
    • {
      • "kty": "string",
      • "kid": "string",
      • "use": "string",
      • "alg": "string",
      • "n": "string",
      • "e": "string",
      • "crv": "string",
      • "x": "string",
      • "y": "string"
      }
    ]
}

Retrieve JWKS

Returns the service JWKS for automation workflows that cannot rely on the /.well-known path.

SecretKey

Responses

Production
